title: Chennai Music Festival 2026
description: A grand celebration of classical and contemporary music featuring top artists from across India. Experience the magic of live performances under the stars.

title: Bangalore Tech Summit 2026
description: Join 500+ developers, designers, and entrepreneurs for a two-day technology summit featuring keynotes, workshops, and networking sessions.

title: Hyderabad Food Carnival
description: Taste the best of Hyderabadi cuisine and street food from 50+ vendors. Cooking competitions, food stalls, and cultural performances await!

title: Mumbai Marathon 2026
description: Join thousands of runners in Mumbai's most anticipated marathon event. Categories for all fitness levels: 5K, 10K, half marathon, and full marathon.

title: Delhi Photography Workshop
description: Learn professional photography techniques from award-winning photographers. Covers composition, lighting, post-processing, and street photography.

title: Chennai Clean City Drive
description: Join hands with volunteers across Chennai to clean beaches, parks, and community areas. Make a difference together for a cleaner, greener Chennai.

title: Bangalore AI & ML Conference
description: Explore the frontiers of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Talks from industry leaders at Google, Microsoft, and top AI startups.

title: Hyderabad Rock Night
description: An electrifying night of rock music featuring India's top rock bands. Headbanging, mosh pits, and the ultimate rock experience in Hyderabad!

title: Mumbai Street Food Tour
description: Discover Mumbai's legendary street food scene with a guided tour through Juhu, Bandra, and Colaba. Vada pav, pav bhaji, and more await!

title: Delhi Community Yoga Day
description: Celebrate International Yoga Day with a mass yoga session in Lodhi Garden. Open to all skill levels — bring your mat and embrace wellness.

title: Bangalore Football League
description: Amateur football tournament open to teams across Bangalore. 5-a-side format with trophies for top 3 teams. Register your squad today!

title: Chennai Web Development Bootcamp
description: Intensive 2-day bootcamp covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js. Hands-on projects and mentorship included. Certificates provided.
